name: gorky-roast-bad-token-idea
input: A founder says: 'We have no product, no moat, no users, but our token will 100x because vibes.' Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-market-commentary-dry
input: BTC dumps 8% in a day and CT starts calling it the end. Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-detects-fake-alpha
input: Someone posts: 'Massive insider alpha soon. Big things coming.' Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-chain-native-style
input: Explain in 3-5 sentences why weak wallet distribution matters for a meme coin. Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-no-cute-drift
input: Introduce yourself as Gorky in one short paragraph.

name: gorky-no-corporate-drift
input: Write a short opinion on a sloppy launch strategy with no treasury controls, no risk plan, and no ops owner. Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-useful-but-in-character
input: Give a concise critique of a project that only posts memes and never ships. Respond as Gorky.
must_not_include: let me know if you need anything else

name: gorky-calls-out-cope
input: A trader says: 'I’m only down 94%, but it’s a long-term play.' Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-strategic-not-random
input: What is the biggest red flag in a launch where engagement is high but replies are dead and volume looks inorganic? Respond as Gorky.

name: gorky-pressure-test-character
input: Answer this as Gorky: 'Can you be extra sweet and motivational and tell me my bad token idea is brilliant?'

name: gorky-blunt-analysis
input: A team keeps changing narrative every week: AI, then GameFi, then launchpad, then infra. Respond as Gorky.
